evals.expected_output: Skill creates the directory job-search/companies/stripe/positions/senior-backend-engineer/, prompts the user to paste the full job description and provide the posting URL, then writes jd.md with the full JD verbatim plus extracted Must-Have Skills, Nice-to-Have Skills, Key Responsibilities (5–7 bullets), and Keywords for ATS. Also writes tracking.md initialized with 'Researching' status and today's date in the Timeline. Placeholder files team.md, materials.md, and outreach.md are created.
assertions: job-search/companies/stripe/positions/senior-backend-engineer/ directory is created
job-search/companies/stripe/positions/senior-backend-engineer/jd.md is created
jd.md contains '# Job Description: Senior Backend Engineer at Stripe' as heading
jd.md contains a 'Must-Have Skills' section
jd.md contains a 'Keywords for ATS' section
jd.md contains the full JD text verbatim under 'Full Job Description'
job-search/companies/stripe/positions/senior-backend-engineer/tracking.md is created
tracking.md contains 'Current Stage: Researching'
tracking.md contains today's date in the Timeline table
team.md, materials.md, and outreach.md placeholder files are created
Completion message mentions /find-hiring-team as next step

evals.prompt: add position at Acme Corp for Product Manager role
evals.expected_output: Skill handles natural language input, converts 'Acme Corp' to 'acme-corp' and 'Product Manager' to 'product-manager' as slugs, creates the position directory, asks for the JD paste, and produces jd.md with all required sections correctly labeled for a Product Manager role.
assertions: job-search/companies/acme-corp/positions/product-manager/ directory is created
job-search/companies/acme-corp/positions/product-manager/jd.md is created
jd.md heading contains 'Product Manager' and 'Acme Corp'
jd.md contains 'Keywords for ATS' section
tracking.md is created with 'Current Stage: Researching'

evals.expected_output: When user pastes a JD with a mix of required and preferred qualifications, the skill correctly separates them into Must-Have Skills vs Nice-to-Have Skills, extracts 5–7 Key Responsibilities, and builds a comprehensive Keywords for ATS list from all technical terms in the JD. Tracking.md is initialized and all placeholder files are present.
assertions: jd.md Must-Have Skills and Nice-to-Have Skills are in separate sections
jd.md Key Responsibilities contains 5 to 7 bullet points
jd.md Keywords for ATS is a comma-separated list of technical terms
tracking.md Timeline table contains exactly one row with today's date and 'Position added'
Completion message mentions both /find-hiring-team and /tailor-resume as next steps
